basic_details.job_title: NWDA Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Deputy Director/Executive Engineer and Superintending Engineer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer and Superintending Engineer (Civil)
basic_details.short_information: National Water Development Agency (NWDA) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 9 Deputy Director/Executive Engineer and Superintending Engineer (Civil) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering, Degree in Civil Engineering, 5 years experience in irrigation and water resources projects
qualification.details: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer: Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent from a recognized Institute; at least 5 years of experience in applied research in the field of irrigation and water utilization and/or in surveys, investigations, designs, construction, operation and maintenance of irrigation projects/works. Superintending Engineer: Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent from a recognized Institute/University; at least 5 years of experience in applied research in the field of irrigation and water utilization and/or in surveys, investigations, designs, construction, operation and maintenance of irrigation projects/works.

salary_details.details: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer: Level 11 in Pay Matrix (Rs.67700-208700/-) Per Month Superintending Engineer: Level 12 in Pay Matrix (Rs.78800-209200/-) Per Month

selection_process: Bio-data screening APARs review Vigilance Clearance Selection by Competent Authority
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NWDA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.nwda.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.national_water_development_agency_nwda: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer and Superintending Engineer (Civil)
Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering, Degree in Civil Engineering, 5 years experience in irrigation and water resources projects

content_sections.heading: NWDA Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NWDA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NWDA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NWDA Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer: Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent from a recognized Institute; at least 5 years of experience in applied research in the field of irrigation and water utilization and/or in surveys, investigations, designs, construction, operation and maintenance of irrigation projects/works. Superintending Engineer: Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent from a recognized Institute/University; at least 5 years of experience in applied research in the field of irrigation and water utilization and/or in surveys, investigations, designs, construction, operation and maintenance of irrigation projects/works.

content_sections.heading: NWDA Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: NWDA Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Deputy Director/Executive Engineer: Level 11 in Pay Matrix (Rs.67700-208700/-) Per Month Superintending Engineer: Level 12 in Pay Matrix (Rs.78800-209200/-) Per Month

content_sections.heading: NWDA Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Bio-data screening APARs review Vigilance Clearance Selection by Competent Authority

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NWDA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://www.nwda.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NWDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for NWDA Recruitment 2026 is 02-08-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NWDA?
faq.answer: NWDA has released a total of 9 vacancies for the posts of Deputy Director/Executive Engineer and Superintending Engineer (Civil).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Deputy Director/Executive Engineer, a Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with 5 years of experience is required. For Superintending Engineer, a Degree in Civil Engineering with 5 years of experience is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to NWDA posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 56 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 67700 to Rs. 209200 per month, depending on the post and pay matrix level.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NWDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the NWDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NWDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes bio-data screening, review of APARs, vigilance clearance, and final selection by the Competent Authority.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the NWDA official website. A direct link is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job portals or the official website itself.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this NWDA recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Deputation posts, meaning candidates will be appointed on deputation from their parent department.
